params.SpellDescription: Choose target creature that's blocking equipped creature. Flip a coin. If you win the flip, exile the chosen creature. Otherwise, CARDNAME deals 1 damage to it.
params.TgtPrompt: Select target creature blocking equipped creature

params.TriggerDescription: Whenever equipped creature attacks, you get {E}{E} (two energy counters).
